name: Phage

passives.name: Rage
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] grant {{as|{{rd|20|10}} '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 2 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks grant bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

simpleDescription: Attacks and kills give a small burst of speed

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Rage grants bonus movement speed on basic-attack hits for 2 seconds, with 20 movement speed for melee and 10 for ranged.
Player-visible behavior: repeated basic attacks refresh the short movement-speed window and keep chase/disengage tempo active.
